reviews.comment:
La peor YPF. Surtidores viejos. Ambos baños fuera de servicio.
Puesto de agua gratis de Taragüí también deshabilitado para cobrarte $1000 la ficha de otra máquina que tienen ellos.
Y encima sale una mujer que trabaja ahí (no sé si dueña o empleada) a decir que "la gente siempre se queja sin razón y quiere todo gratis"

(Translated by Google)
The worst YPF ever. Old pumps. Both bathrooms are out of service. The free Taragüí water station is also disabled, so they charge you $1000 for a token for another machine they have.
And to top it all off, a woman who works there (I don't know if she's the owner or an employee) comes out and says that "people always complain for no reason and want everything for free."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8340619594879844057/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21sdFFuZzFjSFpQUVhCSU5HNWtaWFphU2s1RFkzYxAB
